title: BITS Pilani Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow / Test Engineer Posts
organization: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani)
short_info: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani) Junior Research Fellow / Test Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on 30 April 2026 on the official website of BITS Pilani. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow / Test Engineer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech in Electronics and Telecommunication/Communication/Microwave Engineering, Diploma in ECE/EEE
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: Essential: B.E/B.Tech + First class M.E/M.Tech in Electronics and Telecommunication/Communication or Microwave Engineering or allied disciplines. Desirable: Experience in CST/COMSOL/HFSS, PIC Simulation, Python. Test Engineer: Diploma or B.Tech in ECE/EEE. Desirable: Good English, hands-on electrical/electronic equipment, RF instruments like VNA, spectrum analyzer, Python.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BITS Pilani to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
